category_sources: Official Checkmarx product page describes 2MS as detecting credentials and sensitive details in code repositories and collaboration platforms.
source_facts.description says it detects secrets in files and communication platforms.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading is 2ms (Too Many Secrets).
docs_sources: Official Checkmarx product page links to the 2MS GitHub README.
Official GitHub README documents quick start, scan targets, configuration, reports, and automation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/Checkmarx/2ms, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official README lists filesystem, git, Confluence, Slack, Discord, and Paligo scan targets.
source_facts.description identifies secret detection in files and communication platforms.
